name: Invoke-Obfuscation STDIN+ Launcher - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jonathan Cheong, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation STDIN+ Launcher - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects Obfuscated use of stdin to execute PowerShell

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%powershell%')) AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%${input}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%noexit%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '% /c %' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '% /r %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation STDIN+ Launcher - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%powershell%')) AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%${input}%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%noexit%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '% /c %' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '% /r %') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Invoke-Obfuscation STDIN+ Launcher - Security
